description: Policy for XML cleanup and normalization in the BenchCore benchmark pack. Defines cleanup steps, validation rules, and error handling procedures.

cleanup_steps.name: Strip XML declarations
cleanup_steps.description: Remove <?xml ...?> declarations from input XML strings.

cleanup_steps.name: Normalize whitespace
cleanup_steps.description: Collapse consecutive whitespace characters into single spaces within element text content.

cleanup_steps.name: Strip CDATA sections
cleanup_steps.description: Extract content from CDATA sections and replace the CDATA wrapper with the raw content.
cleanup_steps.note: Disabled by default; enable only when CDATA preservation is not required.

cleanup_steps.name: Remove empty elements
cleanup_steps.description: Remove XML elements that have no text content and no child elements.

cleanup_steps.name: Encode special characters
cleanup_steps.description: Ensure all special characters (&, <, >, ", ') are properly XML-encoded in text content.

validation_rules.description: All opened tags must be closed.
Attribute values must be properly quoted.
